name: postgres
description: PostgreSQL database operations: queries, DDL, ORM-style CRUD, transactions

ports.name: postgres
ports.description: PostgreSQL database operations: queries, DDL, ORM-style CRUD, transactions

capabilities.name: query
capabilities.purpose: Execute a SELECT query and return rows

capabilities.name: execute
capabilities.purpose: Execute an INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and return rows affected

capabilities.name: find
capabilities.purpose: Find a single row by ID (ORM-style)

capabilities.name: find_many
capabilities.purpose: Find multiple rows with structured filter

capabilities.name: aggregate
capabilities.purpose: Run an aggregate function (SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX) with optional grouping

capabilities.name: create_table
capabilities.purpose: Create a table (DDL CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS)

capabilities.name: drop_table
capabilities.purpose: Drop a table (DDL DROP TABLE IF EXISTS)

capabilities.name: insert
capabilities.purpose: Insert a row with column/value pairs

capabilities.name: update
capabilities.purpose: Update rows matching a WHERE filter

capabilities.name: delete
capabilities.purpose: Delete rows matching a WHERE filter

capabilities.name: begin_transaction
capabilities.purpose: Execute multiple statements atomically within a transaction

capabilities.name: commit
capabilities.purpose: Commit a transaction (provided for API completeness)

capabilities.name: rollback
capabilities.purpose: Rollback a transaction (provided for API completeness)
